page_metadata.biotools__summary: ChewieSnake is an end-to-end cgMLST based workflow for analyzing a set of assemblies (or reads) and obtaining an easy-to-interpret cgMLST report.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ChewieSnake is an end-to-end cgMLST based workflow for analyzing a set of assemblies (or reads) and obtaining an easy-to-interpret cgMLST report.
